entries.result: Cave-in — a section of ceiling collapses; everyone rolls to avoid being buried
Elite patrol — a tougher, well-equipped group actively searching the area
Trap — concealed hazard (pit, tripwire, pressure plate)
Wandering patrol — 1d4 guards or monsters moving through
Environmental hazard — gas pocket, unstable floor, or rising water
Empty — signs of very recent occupation (cold embers, discarded food)
Abandoned cache — supplies or valuables, possibly trapped
Distant sounds — scraping, voices, or movement just out of sight
Survivor — a wounded, lost, or hiding NPC
Unmarked door or passage — not on any map, recently disturbed
The dungeon goes silent — something is hunting nearby
